steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Python code to compute indicators for Neoenergia based on the provided December 2024 data
import math
# Given figures (values in BRL, units in billions where appropriate)
AT_Total = 109_541_000_000.0  # Total Assets (as of 2024-12-31)
Caixa = 7_730_000_000.0      # Disponibilidades/ Caixa e equivalentes
AtivoCirculante = 24_895_000_000.0
PassivoCirculante = 20_470_000_000.0
Fornecedores = 4_099_000_000.0
 PatrimônioLiquidoConsolidado = 32_747_000_000.0  # equity (as of 2024-12-31)
# Receita líquida (12 meses) - net revenue
ReceitaLiquida12m = 48_993_000_000.0
# Gross profit
ResultadoBruto = 13_097_000_000.0
# Despesas operacionais (Vendas e administrativas)
DespesasVendas = 286_000_000.0
DespesasGeralAdmin = 2_249_000_000.0
# Depreciation & Amortization
DandA = 2_872_000_000.0
# EBIT calculation (operating income) as gross profit minus selling and admin
EBIT12m = ResultadoBruto - DespesasVendas - DespesasGeralAdmin
# Net income
LucroLiquido12m = 3_682_000_000.0
# 9M net revenue (to compute quarterly values if needed)
ReceitaLiquida9m = 47_620_000_000.0
# 9M EBIT approximated using 9M numbers; we will compute from 12m EBIT and adjust? We'll leave 12m EBIT below
# EBIT per share computations require number of shares outstanding
ORD_SHARES_ISSUED = 1_213_797_248.0
ORD_SHARES_TREASURY = 640_674.0
TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING = ORD_SHARES_ISSUED - ORD_SHARES_TREASURY
# LPA (eps) using Net Income / Outstanding shares
EPS12m = LucroLiquido12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
# LPA rounded to 2 decimals
EPS12m_round = round(EPS12m, 2)
EPS12m_round
print('TOTAL SHARES OUTSTANDING:', TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
print('EPS12m:', EPS12m, 'rounded', EPS12m_round)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

{"inp":{"code":"# Python code to compute indicators for Neoenergia based on the provided December 2024 data
import math
# Given figures (values in BRL, units in billions where appropriate)
AT_Total = 109_541_000_000.0  # Total Assets (as of 2024-12-31)
Caixa = 7_730_000_000.0      # Disponibilidades/ Caixa e equivalentes
AtivoCirculante = 24_895_000_000.0
PassivoCirculante = 20_470_000_000.0
Fornecedores = 4_099_000_000.0
PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado = 32_747_000_000.0  # equity (as of 2024-12-31)
# Receita líquida (12 meses) - net revenue
ReceitaLiquida12m = 48_993_000_000.0
# Gross profit
ResultadoBruto = 13_097_000_000.0
# Despesas operacionais (Vendas e administrativas)
DespesasVendas = 286_000_000.0
DespesasGeralAdmin = 2_249_000_000.0
# Depreciation & Amortization
DandA = 2_872_000_000.0
# EBIT calculation (operating income) as gross profit minus selling and admin
EBIT12m = ResultadoBruto - DespesasVendas - DespesasGeralAdmin
# Net income
LucroLiquido12m = 3_682_000_000.0
# 9M net revenue (to compute quarterly values if needed)
ReceitaLiquida9m = 47_620_000_000.0
# 9M EBIT approximation: Use 12m EBIT scaled by 9/12 as a simple approach
EBIT9m = EBIT12m * (9/12)
# Number of shares outstanding
ORD_SHARES_ISSUED = 1_213_797_248.0
ORD_SHARES_TREASURY = 640_674.0
TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING = ORD_SHARES_ISSUED - ORD_SHARES_TREASURY
# LPA (eps) using Net Income / Outstanding shares
EPS12m = LucroLiquido12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
EPS12m_round = round(EPS12m, 2)
print('TOTAL SHARES OUTSTANDING:', TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
print('EPS12m:', EPS12m, 'rounded', EPS12m_round)
# Compute per-share metrics for P/ indicators later
"} }

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute full set of indicators with precise numbers
AT_Total = 109_541_000_000.0
Caixa = 7_730_000_000.0
AtivoCirculante = 24_895_000_000.0
PassivoCirculante = 20_470_000_000.0
Fornecedores = 4_099_000_000.0
PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado = 32_747_000_000.0
ReceitaLiquida12m = 48_993_000_000.0
ResultadoBruto = 13_097_000_000.0
DespesasVendas = 286_000_000.0
DespesasGeralAdmin = 2_249_000_000.0
dep = 2_872_000_000.0
LucroLiquido12m = 3_682_000_000.0
ReceitaLiquida9m = 47_620_000_000.0
EBIT12m = ResultadoBruto - DespesasVendas - DespesasGeralAdmin
EBIT9m = EBIT12m * (9/12)
DandA = dep
# Shares
ORD_SHARES_ISSUED = 1_213_797_248.0
ORD_SHARES_TREASURY = 640_674.0
TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING = ORD_SHARES_ISSUED - ORD_SHARES_TREASURY
EPS12m = LucroLiquido12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
LPA = EPS12m
LPA_per = LPA
BVPS = PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
GiroAtivos = ReceitaLiquida12m / AT_Total
CapGiro = (AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirante) / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
AtivoCircLiq = (AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirante) / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
P_VP = 20.94 / BVPS
P_Ativos = 20.94 / (AT_Total / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
P_CapGiro = 20.94 / CapGiro
P_AtivCircLiq = 20.94 / AtivoCircLiq
P_EBIT = 20.94 / (EBIT12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
P_EBITDA = None
# EBITDA
EBITDA12m = EBIT12m + DandA
EV = 20.94 * TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING + ((52_600_000_000.0 - 7_730_000_000.0))  # market cap + net debt approximated
# We'll compute Net Debt precisely
Dibruta = 7_502_000_000.0 + 45_098_000_000.0  # short + long term
NetDebt = Dibruta - Caixa
EV = 20.94 * TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING + NetDebt
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA12m
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT12m
# LPA and VPA we computed
LPA = float(EPS12m)
VPA = BVPS
MargBruta = ResultadoBruto / ReceitaLiquida12m
MargEBIT = EBIT12m / ReceitaLiquida12m
MargLiquida = LucroLiquido12m / ReceitaLiquida12m
EBIT_por_Ativo = EBIT12m / AT_Total
ROIC = EBIT12m / (AT_Total - Fornecedores - Caixa)
ROE = LucroLiquido12m / PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado
LiquidezCorr = (AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirante) / PassivoCirante
DivBrP = (Fornecedores + 0.0)  # placeholder
# Debt/equity ratio = Dívida Bruta / Patrimônio Liquido
DibBruta = 7_502_000_000.0 + 45_098_000_000.0
DibPatr = DibBruta / PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado
# Giro de ativos
GiroAtivos = ReceitaLiquida12m / AT_Total

print('TOTAL SHARES OUTSTANDING', TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
print('EPS12m', EPS12m)
print('LPA', LPA)
print('BVPS', BVPS)
print('P/VP', P_VP)
print('Preço/EBIT', P_EBIT)
print('EV', EV)
print('EBITDA12m', EBITDA12m)
print('EV/EBITDA', EV_EBITDA)
print('EV/EBIT', EV_EBIT)
print('Marg Bruta', MargBruta)
print('Marg EBIT', MargEBIT)
print('Marg Liquida', MargLiquida)
print('ROIC', ROIC)
print('ROE', ROE)
print('Liquidez Corr', LiquidezCorr)
print('Giro Ativos', GiroAtivos)
print('P/Ativos', 20.94 / (AT_Total / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING))
print('P/Cap.Giro', 20.94 / CapGiro)
print('P/Ativ Circ Liq', 20.94 / AtivoCircLiq)
print('P/L (P/L)', 20.94 / LPA)
print('P/EBIT', 20.94 / (EBIT12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING))
print('P/EBITDA', EV_EBITDA)
"} } }"} 

}

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute core indicators with careful step-by-step
AT_Total = 109_541_000_000.0
Caixa = 7_730_000_000.0
AtivoCirculante = 24_895_000_000.0
PassivoCirculante = 20_470_000_000.0
Fornecedores = 4_099_000_000.0
PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado = 32_747_000_000.0
ReceitaLiquida12m = 48_993_000_000.0
ResultadoBruto = 13_097_000_000.0
DespesasVendas = 286_000_000.0
DespesasGeralAdmin = 2_249_000_000.0
DandA = 2_872_000_000.0
LucroLiquido12m = 3_682_000_000.0
# EBIT
EBIT12m = ResultadoBruto - DespesasVendas - DespesasGeralAdmin
# Nine months revenue for 9M (from quarterly data in the prompt):
ReceitaLiquida9m = 47_620_000_000.0
# Shares
ORD_SHARES_ISSUED = 1_213_797_248.0
ORD_SHARES_TREASURY = 640_674.0
TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING = ORD_SHARES_ISSUED - ORD_SHARES_TREASURY
# EPS / LPA
EPS12m = LucroLiquido12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
LPA = EPS12m
# BV per share
BVPS = PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
VPA = BVPS
# Margin calculations
MargBruta = ResultadoBruto / ReceitaLiquida12m
MargEBIT = EBIT12m / ReceitaLiquida12m
MargLiquida = LucroLiquido12m / ReceitaLiquida12m
# EBIT / Ativo
EBIT_por_Ativo = EBIT12m / AT_Total
# Invested capital for ROIC
InvestedCapital = AT_Total - Fornecedores - Caixa
ROIC = EBIT12m / InvestedCapital
ROE = LucroLiquido12m / PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado
# Current ratio using the provided method: (AC - PC) / PC
LiquidezCorr = (AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirculante) / PassivoCirculante
# Debt metrics
DibBruta = 7_502_000_000.0 + 45_098_000_000.0
DibP = DibBruta / PatrimonioLiquidoConsolidado
# Capex metrics for P/Ativos and P/Cap.Giro
CapGiro = (AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirculante)  # in BRL, then per share later
GiroAtivos = ReceitaLiquida12m / AT_Total
# P/S and EV metrics
Price = 20.94
MarketCap = Price * TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
NetDebt = (7_502_000_000.0 + 45_098_000_000.0) - Caixa
EV = MarketCap + NetDebt
# EBITDA
EBITDA12m = EBIT12m + DandA
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA12m
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT12m
# P/E-like values
P_VP = Price / BVPS
P_L = Price / LPA
P_Ativos = Price / (AT_Total / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
P_CapGiro = Price / (CapGiro / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
P_AtivCircLiq = Price / ((AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirculante) / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
P_EBIT = Price / (EBIT12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
P_EBITDA = Price / (EBITDA12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
GiroAtivos_per = GiroAtivos
PSR = Price / (ReceitaLiquida12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)

# 3-month and 12-month figures for EBIT/Revenue etc ready
print('TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING:', TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
print('LPA:', LPA)
print('BVPS:', BVPS)
print('PSR (annual):', PSR)
print('P/VPA:', P_VP)
print('P/Ativos:', P_Ativos)
print('P/Cap.Giro:', P_CapGiro)
print('P/Ativ Circ Liq:', P_AtivCircLiq)
print('P/EBIT:', P_EBIT)
print('P/EBITDA:', P_EBITDA)
print('EV/EBITDA:', EV_EBITDA)
print('EV/EBIT:', EV_EBIT)
print('Marg Bruta:', MargBruta)
print('Marg EBIT:', MargEBIT if 'MargEBIT' in locals() else 'N/A')
print('Marg Líquida:', MargLiquida)
print('EBIT/Ativo:', EBIT_por_Ativo)
print('ROIC:', ROIC)
print('ROE:', ROE)
print('Liquidez Corr:', LiquidezCorr)
print('Giro Ativos:', GiroAtivos)
print('CapGiro/Share:', CapGiro / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
print('P/L (annual):', Price / LPA)
print('LPA (per share):', LPA)
print('Receita Liquida 12m per share:', ReceitaLiquida12m / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
print('Receita Liquida 9m per share:', ReceitaLiquida9m if 'ReceitaLiquida9m' in locals() else None)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
